text: This project uses FastAPI for all HTTP endpoints
We prefer PostgreSQL over MySQL
All services are containerized with Docker
The developer uses snake_case for Python variables
Never use global state in request handlers
JWT tokens expire after 24 hours
Redis is used for session caching only
All dates stored as UTC Unix timestamps
The main branch is protected, require PR reviews
Docker Compose used for local development
We use TypeScript, not JavaScript
API responses follow the JSON:API specification
Authentication uses JWT with 24-hour expiry
The monorepo is managed with Turborepo
Python services use FastAPI, not Flask
Avoid ORM models with lazy loading
Use alembic for database migrations
Logging uses structured JSON format
Error responses include correlation IDs
Rate limiting is applied to all public endpoints
